controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.p1: The data controller for personal data is:
controller.company: CYNA SAS — 10 Rue de la Cybersécurité, 75001 Paris

data.title: 2. Data collected
data.intro: As part of using our services, we collect the following data:
data.identity: Identification data: last name, first name, email address
data.billing: Billing data: postal address, payment information (encrypted)
data.connection: Connection data: IP address, access logs, browser
data.usage: Usage data: subscribed services, order history
data.note: We do not collect any sensitive data within the meaning of Article 9 of the GDPR.

purposes.title: 3. Purposes of processing
purposes.intro: Your data is collected for the following purposes:
purposes.i1: Creation and management of your customer account
purposes.i2: Provision and billing of subscribed services
purposes.i4: Sending communications related to your subscription
purposes.i6: Compliance with our legal and accounting obligations

basis.title: 4. Legal basis
basis.intro: Processing is based on the following legal grounds:
basis.contract: Performance of contract — for account management and service provision
basis.legal: Legal obligation — for billing data retention
basis.interest: Legitimate interest — for platform security and fraud prevention

retention.title: 5. Retention period
retention.account: Account data: duration of contractual relationship + 3 years

sharing.title: 6. Data sharing
sharing.intro: We never sell your personal data. It may only be shared with:
sharing.stripe: Our payment provider (Stripe) — billing data only
sharing.ovh: Our host (OVH) — for secure hosting purposes

rights.title: 7. Your rights (GDPR)
rights.intro: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights:
rights.access: Right of access — obtain a copy of your data
rights.rectification: Right of rectification — correct inaccurate data
rights.erasure: Right to erasure — request deletion of your data
rights.portability: Right to portability — receive your data in a structured format
rights.opposition: Right to object — object to certain processing
rights.limitation: Right to restriction — restrict the processing of your data
rights.contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at
rights.cnil: You may also lodge a complaint with the

cookies.title: 8. Cookies
cookies.intro: The site uses cookies strictly necessary for platform operation:
cookies.note: No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.

security.title: 9. Security
security.p1: As a cybersecurity company, protecting your data is at the heart of our practices. We apply TLS encryption, password hashing (bcrypt), regular security audits and a strict need-to-know data access policy.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.p1: For any questions regarding this policy:
